name: 响应式布局
summary: Responsive frontend layout strategy for mobile-first breakpoints, container queries, fluid grids, data-dense screens, touch targets, and cross-device verification.
description: Use when designing, implementing, or reviewing responsive frontend layouts, mobile-first breakpoints, container queries, fluid grids, data-dense tables, touch targets, safe areas, orientation changes, viewport overflow, or cross-device UI behavior; Chinese triggers include 响应式布局, 移动端适配, 断点, 容器查询, 横竖屏, 触摸目标.

boundaryWorkflows: Use UI design when the task is visual direction, product identity, hierarchy, or polish beyond layout behavior.
Use accessibility check for keyboard, focus, semantics, screen reader behavior, and contrast concerns.
Use performance optimization when responsive behavior exposes rendering, image, bundle, or main-thread bottlenecks.
